reading.title: Reading: A great football match
reading.passage: We trained really hard last week, and it worked. We scored three goals, and we defeated the other team easily. The game finished quite late, but everyone enjoyed it.

reading.title: Reading: A beach weekend
reading.passage: We went to the beach with some friends. We had a wonderful time, and we saw a beautiful sunset together. Our friends came early, and we made a small bonfire on the sand.

questions.question: What did they make on the sand?
questions.explanation: "we made a small bonfire on the sand."
